subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, the Ever-Abiding, the Eternal, the Single, the One, the Everlasting, the Self-Subsisting, Who hath taken unto Himself no partner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الباقی الدائم الفرد الاحد الابد القیوم لم یتخذ لنفسه شریکا فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @pairs in creation; male and female; B and E; agent and patient, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
